description: Using the loaded CT Cranium DICOM dataset, export screenshots of the following anatomical views: an axial view of the orbits to /home/ga/Documents/axial_orbits.png, a sagittal midline view showing the nasal cavity and brainstem to /home/ga/Documents/sagittal_midline.png, and a coronal view of the petrous temporal bones to /home/ga/Documents/coronal_petrous.png. Ensure the relevant anatomy is clearly visible in each export.
